results.title: Thailand Train Crash: 8 Dead as Bus Hit, Fuel Tank Explodes!
results.description: A public bus got stuck on railway tracks in Bangkok due to heavy traffic, leading to a horrific collision with a speeding freight train. The crash turned deadly within moments, highlighting the dangers of congestion near railway crossings.

results.title: Karnal begins flood protection works along Yamuna ahead of monsoon
results.description: Learning from repeated flood damage in previous years, the Irrigation Department has launched extensive flood protection works along the Yamuna ahead of the monsoon to safeguard nearly 30 villages in Karnal district from flash floods. The department has awarded works worth Rs 22 crore to six agencies for carrying out flood-control measures at 10 vulnerable [...]

results.title: HDFC Mutual Funds: 5 schemes delivered over 15% CAGR in 10 years, turned Rs 10,000 monthly SIP into up to Rs 35 lakh - LIST
results.description: HDFC Mutual Fund's top-performing schemes are a clear example that long-term mutual fund investment continues to reward patience. Several schemes had delivered over 15% CAGR in the last decade, turning a Rs 10,000 monthly SIP into as much as Rs 35 lakh.

results.title: Ananya Panday-Lakshya’s Chand Mera Dil Censored: CBFC Cuts 96-Second Kiss Scene Before U/A Certificate — What Does It Mean For The Film?
results.description: Chand Mera Dil starring Ananya Panday and Lakshya Lalwani cleared the CBFC with a U/A 16+ rating. A 96-second kissing scene and other intimate moments were trimmed. Runtime locked at 135 min 36 sec. Film releases May 22, 2026 with a parental guidance advisory. The post Ananya Panday-Lakshya’s Chand Mera Dil Censored: CBFC Cuts 96-Second Kiss Scene Before U/A Certificate — What Does It Mean For The Film? appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.description: The filing shows that he or his investment advisers made more than 3,700 trades in the first quarter, reigniting conflict-of-interest concerns around the Trump administration

results.title: DJ Pumma, Influential New York-Based Korean DJ, Dies of Cancer at 46
results.description: New York-based South Korean artist DJ Pumma has died at the age of 46 following a courageous battle with cancer, according to an announcement on her social media channels. Known for her open-format style, she built a distinct career in the city's music scene with notable performances on Sway in the Morning and collaborations with global brands.
